title: (PKT) Adult Gold Celebration 50th Latex Balloons- 6 Pack
features: Celebrate a Happy 50th Birthday in a special way with the 50th Birthday Latex Balloons Glittery Gold This Latex balloon features a big silver number 50 in the middle and a happy birthday headline in white surrounded with white sparkles
Create a lovely Birthday celebration with these lovely balloons They can be filled and scattered around the party room or tied together to create a fun balloon bouquet
This Latex balloon is supplied deflated and suitable for air or helium inflation It has colorful prints for that fun and exciting look
